=== FULL DATABASE CONTEXT FOR SCHEDULE SYSTEM ===

=== SECTION 1: DATABASE MODELS (SQLAlchemy) ===
"""
Все SQLAlchemy-модели для системы расписания колледжа.
"""

from sqlalchemy import (
    Column, Integer, String, Date, Time, Boolean, ForeignKey,
    Enum as SAEnum, DateTime, Text, UniqueConstraint
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
import enum

from app.database import Base


# ──────────────────────── Enums ────────────────────────

class EmploymentType(str, enum.Enum):
    STAFF = "штатный"
    HOURLY = "почасовой"


class ClassroomType(str, enum.Enum):
    REGULAR = "обычная"
    COMPUTER = "компьютерный класс"
    LABORATORY = "лаборатория"
    GYM = "спортзал"
    SPECIALIZED = "специализированная"


class LessonType(str, enum.Enum):
    LECTURE = "лекция"
    PRACTICE = "практика"
    LAB = "лабораторная"
    TRAINING_PRACTICE = "учебная практика"
    PRODUCTION_PRACTICE = "производственная практика"
    PHYSICAL_EDUCATION = "физическая культура"
    NVP = "НВП"
    CONSULTATION = "консультация"
    ATTESTATION = "аттестация"


class WeekType(str, enum.Enum):
    BOTH = "обе"
    NUMERATOR = "числитель"
    DENOMINATOR = "знаменатель"


class PeriodType(str, enum.Enum):
    STUDY = "учебная неделя"
    NUMERATOR = "числитель"
    DENOMINATOR = "знаменатель"
    TRAINING_PRACTICE = "учебная практика"
    PRODUCTION_PRACTICE = "производственная практика"
    MIDTERM = "промежуточная аттестация"
    FINAL = "итоговая аттестация"
    VACATION = "каникулы"
    NON_STUDY = "неучебный период"


class ScheduleStatus(str, enum.Enum):
    DRAFT = "черновик"
    GENERATED = "сгенерировано"
    EDITED = "отредактировано"
    APPROVED = "утверждено"
    PUBLISHED = "опубликовано"
    ARCHIVED = "архив"


class UserRole(str, enum.Enum):
    ADMIN = "администратор"
    DISPATCHER = "диспетчер"
    TEACHER = "преподаватель"
    STUDENT = "студент"
    MANAGEMENT = "администрация"


# ──────────────────────── Models ────────────────────────

class Department(Base):
    __tablename__ = "departments"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String(200), nullable=False, unique=True)

    groups = relationship("Group", back_populates="department")


class AcademicYear(Base):
    __tablename__ = "academic_years"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)  # "2025-2026"
    start_date = Column(Date, nullable=False)
    end_date = Column(Date, nullable=False)

    semesters = relationship("Semester", back_populates="academic_year")


class Semester(Base):
    __tablename__ = "semesters"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    academic_year_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("academic_years.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    number = Column(Integer, nullable=False)  # 1 или 2
    start_date = Column(Date, nullable=False)
    end_date = Column(Date, nullable=False)

    academic_year = relationship("AcademicYear", back_populates="semesters")
    hour_grids = relationship("HourGrid", back_populates="semester")
    academic_periods = relationship("AcademicPeriod", back_populates="semester")
    schedule_versions = relationship("ScheduleVersion", back_populates="semester")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("academic_year_id", "number", name="uq_semester_year_number"),
    )


class Group(Base):
    __tablename__ = "groups"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    course = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    department_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("departments.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    student_count = Column(Integer, default=0)

    department = relationship("Department", back_populates="groups")
    subgroups = relationship("Subgroup", back_populates="group", cascade="all, delete-orphan")
    hour_grids = relationship("HourGrid", back_populates="group")
    academic_periods = relationship("AcademicPeriod", back_populates="group")
    teacher_subjects = relationship("TeacherSubject", back_populates="group")
    schedule_entries = relationship("ScheduleEntry", back_populates="group")


class Subgroup(Base):
    __tablename__ = "subgroups"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    group_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("groups.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)  # "Подгруппа 1", "Подгруппа 2"

    group = relationship("Group", back_populates="subgroups")
    schedule_entries = relationship("ScheduleEntry", back_populates="subgroup")


class Subject(Base):
    __tablename__ = "subjects"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String(300), nullable=False)
    short_name = Column(String(50), nullable=True)

    hour_grids = relationship("HourGrid", back_populates="subject")
    teacher_subjects = relationship("TeacherSubject", back_populates="subject")
    schedule_entries = relationship("ScheduleEntry", back_populates="subject")


class Teacher(Base):
    __tablename__ = "teachers"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    full_name = Column(String(200), nullable=False)
    employment_type = Column(SAEnum(EmploymentType), nullable=False, default=EmploymentType.STAFF)
    max_hours_per_week = Column(Integer, nullable=True)

    availabilities = relationship("TeacherAvailability", back_populates="teacher", cascade="all, delete-orphan")
    classroom_assignments = relationship("ClassroomAssignment", back_populates="teacher", cascade="all, delete-orphan")
    teacher_subjects = relationship("TeacherSubject", back_populates="teacher", cascade="all, delete-orphan")
    schedule_entries = relationship("ScheduleEntry", back_populates="teacher")


class TeacherAvailability(Base):
    __tablename__ = "teacher_availabilities"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    teacher_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("teachers.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    day_of_week = Column(Integer, nullable=False)  # 1=Пн, 2=Вт, ..., 5=Пт
    time_slot_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("time_slots.id"), nullable=False)

    teacher = relationship("Teacher", back_populates="availabilities")
    time_slot = relationship("TimeSlot")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("teacher_id", "day_of_week", "time_slot_id", name="uq_teacher_avail"),
    )


class Classroom(Base):
    __tablename__ = "classrooms"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    type = Column(SAEnum(ClassroomType), nullable=False, default=ClassroomType.REGULAR)
    capacity = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=30)

    assignments = relationship("ClassroomAssignment", back_populates="classroom", cascade="all, delete-orphan")
    schedule_entries = relationship("ScheduleEntry", back_populates="classroom")


class ClassroomAssignment(Base):
    """Закрепление аудитории за преподавателем."""
    __tablename__ = "classroom_assignments"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    classroom_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("classrooms.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    teacher_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("teachers.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)

    classroom = relationship("Classroom", back_populates="assignments")
    teacher = relationship("Teacher", back_populates="classroom_assignments")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("classroom_id", "teacher_id", name="uq_classroom_teacher"),
    )


class TimeSlot(Base):
    """Временной слот (пара)."""
    __tablename__ = "time_slots"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    number = Column(Integer, nullable=False, unique=True)  # 1, 2, 3, 4
    start_time = Column(Time, nullable=False)
    end_time = Column(Time, nullable=False)


class HourGrid(Base):
    """Сетка часов — количество часов по дисциплине для группы за семестр."""
    __tablename__ = "hour_grids"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    group_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("groups.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    subject_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("subjects.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    semester_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("semesters.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    lesson_type = Column(SAEnum(LessonType), nullable=False, default=LessonType.LECTURE)
    total_hours = Column(Integer, nullable=False)  # Общее кол-во часов
    subgroup_hours = Column(String(50), nullable=True)  # "48/48" — деление на подгруппы

    group = relationship("Group", back_populates="hour_grids")
    subject = relationship("Subject", back_populates="hour_grids")
    semester = relationship("Semester", back_populates="hour_grids")


class TeacherSubject(Base):
    """Назначение преподавателя на дисциплину для группы."""
    __tablename__ = "teacher_subjects"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    teacher_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("teachers.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    subject_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("subjects.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    group_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("groups.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)

    teacher = relationship("Teacher", back_populates="teacher_subjects")
    subject = relationship("Subject", back_populates="teacher_subjects")
    group = relationship("Group", back_populates="teacher_subjects")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("teacher_id", "subject_id", "group_id", name="uq_teacher_subject_group"),
    )


class AcademicPeriod(Base):
    """График учебного процесса — тип периода для группы на конкретной неделе."""
    __tablename__ = "academic_periods"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    group_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("groups.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    semester_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("semesters.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    week_number = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    period_type = Column(SAEnum(PeriodType), nullable=False, default=PeriodType.STUDY)

    group = relationship("Group", back_populates="academic_periods")
    semester = relationship("Semester", back_populates="academic_periods")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("group_id", "semester_id", "week_number", name="uq_academic_period"),
    )


class ScheduleVersion(Base):
    """Версия расписания."""
    __tablename__ = "schedule_versions"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    semester_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("semesters.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    status = Column(SAEnum(ScheduleStatus), nullable=False, default=ScheduleStatus.DRAFT)
    created_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), onupdate=func.now())
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)

    semester = relationship("Semester", back_populates="schedule_versions")
    entries = relationship("ScheduleEntry", back_populates="version", cascade="all, delete-orphan")


class ScheduleEntry(Base):
    """Одна запись расписания — конкретное занятие."""
    __tablename__ = "schedule_entries"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    version_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("schedule_versions.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    group_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("groups.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    subgroup_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("subgroups.id", ondelete="SET NULL"), nullable=True)
    subject_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("subjects.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    teacher_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("teachers.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    classroom_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("classrooms.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    day_of_week = Column(Integer, nullable=False)  # 1–5
    time_slot_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("time_slots.id"), nullable=False)
    week_type = Column(SAEnum(WeekType), nullable=False, default=WeekType.BOTH)
    lesson_type = Column(SAEnum(LessonType), nullable=False, default=LessonType.LECTURE)
    is_locked = Column(Boolean, default=False)  # Зафиксировано ли занятие

    version = relationship("ScheduleVersion", back_populates="entries")
    group = relationship("Group", back_populates="schedule_entries")
    subgroup = relationship("Subgroup", back_populates="schedule_entries")
    subject = relationship("Subject", back_populates="schedule_entries")
    teacher = relationship("Teacher", back_populates="schedule_entries")
    classroom = relationship("Classroom", back_populates="schedule_entries")
    time_slot = relationship("TimeSlot")


class User(Base):
    """Пользователь системы."""
    __tablename__ = "users"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    username = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    password_hash = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    role = Column(SAEnum(UserRole), nullable=False, default=UserRole.STUDENT)
    teacher_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("teachers.id", ondelete="SET NULL"), nullable=True)
    full_name = Column(String(200), nullable=True)

    teacher = relationship("Teacher")


=== SECTION 2: EXISTING SQL DATA (bd.sql) ===
-- ==============================================================================
-- 1. СОЗДАНИЕ СТРУКТУРЫ БАЗЫ ДАННЫХ (ТАБЛИЦЫ И СВЯЗИ)
-- ==============================================================================

-- Таблица сотрудников (преподавателей)
CREATE TABLE employees (
    employee_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    phone_number VARCHAR(50)
);

-- Таблица аудиторного фонда (кабинеты и лаборатории)
CREATE TABLE classrooms (
    classroom_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    room_number VARCHAR(50),
    floor VARCHAR(50),
    capacity INT,
    room_type VARCHAR(100),
    subject_name VARCHAR(255),
    head_employee_id INT REFERENCES employees(employee_id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- Таблица учебных групп и контингента студентов
CREATE TABLE student_groups (
    group_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    group_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    course_number INT,
    total_students INT,
    budget_students INT,
    paid_9_students INT,
    paid_11_students INT,
    male_students INT,
    female_students INT
);

-- Сводная таблица (Many-to-Many) для связи Групп и Кураторов
CREATE TABLE group_curators (
    group_id INT REFERENCES student_groups(group_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    employee_id INT REFERENCES employees(employee_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    PRIMARY KEY (group_id, employee_id)
);

-- Фиксируем sequence, чтобы избежать конфликтов при ручном вводе ID
SELECT setval('employees_employee_id_seq', (SELECT MAX(employee_id) FROM employees));


-- ==============================================================================
-- 3. ЗАПОЛНЕНИЕ КАБИНЕТОВ (с привязкой к заведующим)
-- ==============================================================================
-- 
INSERT INTO classrooms (room_number, floor, capacity, room_type, subject_name, head_employee_id) VALUES
('101', '1-й этаж', 30, 'Простой', 'Нан, макарон және кондитер өндірісінің технологиясы', (SELECT employee_id FROM employees WHERE full_name ILIKE '%Сейтбекова%')),

('116', '1-й этаж', 32, 'Простой', 'География', (SELECT employee_id FROM employees WHERE full_name ILIKE '%Жулкашева%')),

('118', '1-й этаж', 30, 'Простой', 'Банк операциялары', (SELECT employee_id FROM employees WHERE full_name ILIKE '%Серикбаева%')),

-- ==============================================================================
-- ТАБЛИЦА ВРЕМЕННЫХ СЛОТОВ (РАСПИСАНИЕ ЗВОНКОВ)
-- ==============================================================================

CREATE TABLE time_slots (
    slot_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    slot_number INT NOT NULL UNIQUE, -- Номер пары по порядку
    start_time TIME NOT NULL,        -- Время начала
    end_time TIME NOT NULL           -- Время окончания
);

-- Заполнение таблицы расписанием звонков
INSERT INTO time_slots (slot_number, start_time, end_time) VALUES
(1, '08:00', '09:30'),
(2, '09:35', '11:05'),
(3, '11:20', '12:50'),
(4, '13:10', '14:40'),
(5, '14:50', '16:20'),
(6, '16:25', '17:55'),
(7, '18:00', '19:30');

--- WORD FILE: кабинет.docx ---

[Text Content]
Азаматтық қызметшілерге, мемлекеттік бюджет қаражаты есебінен ұсталатын ұйымдардың қызметкерлеріне, қазыналық кәсіпорындардың қызметкерлеріне еңбекақы төлеу жүйесі туралы Қазақстан Республикасы Үкіметінің 2015 жылғы 31 желтоқсандағы № 1193 қаулысына өзгерістер мен толықтырулар енгізу туралы Қазақстан Республикасының Үкіметінің 2020 жылғы 28 қаңтардағы № 11 қаулысына және «Педагог мәртебесі туралы» 2019 жылғы 27 желтоқсандағы Қазақстан Республикасының Заңына сәйкес БҰЙЫРАМЫН:
1. 2025-2026 оқу жылының 02 қыркүйегінен бастап  сынып  жетекшілері  мен  кабинет меңгерушілері  төмендегідей   болып  бекітілсін:
2. Оқыту кабинеттерін, зерханаларды меңгергені үшін оқытушыларға БЛА – дан 25% қосымша ақы төленсін.
Жергілікті бюджет бойынша
Негіздеме: Директордың оқу ісі жөніндегі орынбасары Ж.Т.Даулетбаеваның ұсынысы.
3. 2025 жылдың 02 қыркүйегінен бастап топ жетекшілігіне төмендегі оқытушылар бекітілсін.
4. Топ жетекшілігі қызметін атқарғаны үшін оқытушыларға БЛА-дан 50% қосымша ақы төленсін.
Жергілікті бюджет бойынша
5. Топ жетекшілігі қызметін атқарғаны үшін оқытушыларға БЛА-дан 50% қосымша ақы төленсін.
Ақылы қызметтер бойынша
Негізі: Тәрбие ісі жөніндегі директордың орынбасары Д.А.Тайкпанованың ұсынысы.
Колледж директоры                                                      Ж. Қасымбек
